## Agent Example

## Workflow

Which real workflow is this spec based on, and who owns it?

## Required checks

- [ ] Frontmatter uses `content_type: agent-example`
- [ ] `review_status`, `assumptions`, and `risks` are set
- [ ] Human approval points are explicit
- [ ] Security notes are explicit
- [ ] Token-cost notes are explicit
- [ ] Prompt skeleton is included
- [ ] `npm run validate:content` passes
